response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the voice drama teaser, although 'Choco-tachi' was corrected to 'Choco' based on clear audio and on-screen text. Phrasing was adjusted to match the spoken delivery (e.g., 'Zenbu' instead of 'Kore ga subete'). Subtitles include both spoken dialogue and key on-screen promotional text for the 'The Beginning' project, with timings strictly aligned to the audio waveform and visual transitions.

subtitles.original: そして、重大告知、２つ目は、こちら！
subtitles.english: And now, for the second major announcement... this!

subtitles.original: もう二度と会えないの？
subtitles.english: Will I never see you again?

subtitles.original: 不思議ね、キミの言葉を聞くと
subtitles.english: It's strange, when I hear your words,

subtitles.original: なんだか元気が出てきちゃう
subtitles.english: I somehow start to feel better.

subtitles.original: ……ちょこのこと、もう少しだけ知りたいな
subtitles.english: ...I want to know a little bit more about Choco.

subtitles.original: ……ちょこのこと、もっともっと、大好きになってほしい。
subtitles.english: ...I want you to love Choco more and more.
I want to see you once more.

subtitles.original: この想いも、孤独な気持ちも……
subtitles.english: These feelings, and this loneliness too...
I will eat them all up.

subtitles.original: ちょこは小悪魔なんだから。
subtitles.english: Because Choco is a little devil, after all.

subtitles.original: ねえ、もしよければキミに……
ちょこの思い出話、聞いてほしいの。
subtitles.english: I want you to hear Choco's stories.

subtitles.original: 12ヶ月連続オリジナル楽曲リリース＆連動ボイスドラマプロジェクトスタート
subtitles.english: 12-month original song release & linked voice drama project start

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで、癒月ちょこ、12ヶ月連続オリ曲リリースが決定しました！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, it's been decided that Yuzuki Choco will release original songs for 12 consecutive months!
